narrative:
Harrison Twp (precinct in Paulding County) has 971 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
